sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96746" key="sthrikte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στηρ-ικτέον</orth>, <sense id="n96746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must fix, make firm</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:213" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.213</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
